title: PETAFLOP 7x5 Photo Frames Set of 4, Mirrored Glass Picture Frame 5x7 for Wedding Photos, Home and Office Decor
features: Size: The glass photo frames accommodates 5x7 inch photos and can be placed horizontally or vertically on a desk.
Elegant Versatility: The transparent 7x5 frame suits any decor style, making it a perfect adornment for homes, offices, or beach houses.
Superior Craftsmanship: The sturdy all-glass construction protects your memories from dust and wear, Securely packaged picture frame for added peace of mind.
Stylish Design: Silver trim paired with clear glass panels bestows timeless elegance to these frames, presenting your photos with a modern flair.
Gift of Memories: Ideal for weddings, anniversaries, or birthdays, these 5x7 photo frame are unique gifts that stylishly capture life's special moments.
description: Product Description Makes your home interior feel warmer and more intimate. Gives a gentle allure to your family pictures Versatile and Flexible Photos can be added or changed easily （just slide photo in）with turning button at the rear. The bracket and fixing ribbon on the back can make the photo frame more stable and not easy to fall. Sleek and Classy Design The beveled edges will enhance picture, show off your photos in a very eye-catching way,make the picture eye-catching anywhere in the room.
